title: Suns' Devin Booker changes jersey number to No. 15 in honor of his father
summary: Phoenix announced that Booker will switch from No. 1 to No. 15 for 2026-27, honoring his father Melvin Booker and the family number he previously wore with Team USA.

title: Reports: Suns plan to re-sign Collin Gillespie and Jordan Goodwin
summary: NBA.com, citing ESPN's Shams Charania and The Athletic, reported that Phoenix intends to keep both guards on new multi-year deals after their breakout reserve roles this season.

title: Reports: Hawks bring back CJ McCollum on one-year deal
summary: NBA.com, citing ESPN's Shams Charania and The Athletic, reported that Atlanta agreed to a one-year extension with McCollum after his strong finish to the season and playoff run.

title: Consensus Mock Draft: Where things stand entering final week before 2026 NBA Draft
summary: NBA.com's June 19 consensus roundup keeps AJ Dybantsa and Darryn Peterson at the top of the class as the league enters the final weekend before the June 23-24 draft.

title: NBA Summer League 2026 returns to Las Vegas on July 9-19
summary: The league confirmed Las Vegas Summer League will run July 9-19 at Thomas & Mack Center and Cox Pavilion with all 30 teams participating.

title: Tiago Splitter takes over as Bulls coach, promises team will compete
summary: Chicago formally introduced Tiago Splitter as the franchise's 25th head coach, with the former Spurs big man and recent Blazers interim coach emphasizing competition and culture.

title: Michigan's big three ready to hear their names called on Draft night
summary: NBA.com projects Michigan teammates Aday Mara, Yaxel Lendeborg and Morez Johnson Jr. as first-round selections after the trio helped power a national championship run.

title: Sean Sweeney takes over in Orlando after being convinced the fit was right
summary: Orlando introduced Sean Sweeney as head coach after the Spurs' Finals run, with Sweeney saying the Magic job stood out as the right organizational and basketball fit.

title: Recap: Knicks' championship parade in NYC
summary: New York celebrated the Knicks' first championship since 1973 with a Lower Manhattan ticker-tape parade and a City Hall ceremony for the 2026 title team.

title: Numbers to know: 20 intriguing free agents to watch this summer
summary: NBA.com's offseason preview spotlights 20 notable free agents, with LeBron James and James Harden headlining the class before teams can sign deals starting July 6.

title: Knicks-Spurs delivers most-watched NBA Finals since 1998
summary: The league said Knicks-Spurs averaged 20.6 million viewers on ABC and ESPN, making it the most-watched NBA Finals and postseason on those networks since 1998.

title: Wizards' Alex Sarr broke right foot in offseason workout but is expected to recover before next season
summary: Washington announced Alex Sarr underwent surgery to repair a broken right foot suffered in an offseason workout and is expected back before next season.

title: Three additional early entry candidates withdraw from NBA Draft 2026
summary: The NBA said three more international prospects withdrew from the 2026 draft, leaving 26 college early entrants and five international early entrants in the pool.
